tests.description: Runtime error when calling function variable with unknown named arg

evaluationCriteria.judgePrompt: Does the output contain an error about an unknown named argument 'z'? Score 80 if yes.

tests.description: Runtime error when calling function variable with missing required arg

evaluationCriteria.judgePrompt: Does the output contain an error about a missing required argument 'b'? Score 80 if yes.

tests.description: Runtime error when named arg conflicts with positional arg

evaluationCriteria.judgePrompt: Does the output contain an error about a named argument conflicting with a positional argument? Score 80 if yes.
